caption: A man wearing a light-colored button-down shirt and over-ear headphones is centered against a plain, light-gray wall. He is speaking and gesturing with both hands to emphasize his points. In the initial moments, his arms are raised high with his palms open and fingers spread. As time progresses, he lowers his hands, bringing them closer to his chest and moving them inward in a rhythmic, expressive motion. The headphones he wears are black and include a small boom microphone positioned near his mouth. In the bottom left corner of each scene, the on-screen text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in a small, white font. The background and his clothing remain consistent throughout the sequence, while the focus is entirely on his facial expressions and hand movements.
